By incorporating a consensus mechanism, diversity in cognition and diversity in knowledge, and also hierarchical structure, inspired by human annotators' behavior, the proposed method achieves superior results compared to individual Large Language Models (LLMs), including GPT 4 and GPT 3.5. The system leverages open models (e.g., LLaMA, Kimi, Qwen, Deepseek and LLaMA-Nemotron) to ensure greater transparency. The evaluation of the proposed method encompasses datasets in languages with varying resource availability, including English (high-resource), Polish (medium-resource), Slovak (low-resource) and Bulgarian (low-resource). Experiments were conducted on tasks such as direct disinformation detection, identification of texts worthy of verification, and detection of texts containing verifiable factual claims.

</details>


### [367] [DialogPII: A multilingual dataset of synthetic dialog transcripts to detect personal information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30312)
*Roland Roller,Vera Czehmann,Derya Erman,Luke Flanagan,Ibrahim Baroud,Frédéric Blain,Viviana Cotik,Eletta Giusto,Akhil Juneja,Mariana Neves,Maria Słowińska,Christine Hovhannisyan,Aaron Louis Eidt,Lisa Raithel,Sebastian Möller,Maija Poikela*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出DialogPII，一个多语言合成对话数据集，涵盖8种交互场景、19种实体类型和11种语言，用于个人身份信息检测。数据集通过大语言模型半自动生成、人工筛选，并包含语音转录版本。同时提供了基线模型和技术验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对话数据（如医疗、社会科学领域）是宝贵的研究资源，但负责任的数据共享需要检测和移除个人身份与敏感信息以保护隐私。现有针对对话数据的去标识化资源不足，尤其是多语言场景。

Method: 使用大语言模型半自动生成合成对话，经人工筛选确保合理性和多样性，并针对不同国家/城市进行本地化。对话通过TTS转换为语音，再用Whisper转录，最后通过自动投影和人工校正进行标注。

Result: 构建了涵盖11种语言、8种场景、19种实体类型的多模态对话数据集（文本+语音转录），并训练了多语言NER基线模型。通过标注者间一致性、翻译质量、投影评估和基准实验进行了技术验证。

Conclusion: DialogPII为多语言对话数据的自动去标识化提供了高质量的资源支撑，有助于推动隐私保护下的数据共享与研究。

Abstract: Conversational data collected in domains such as healthcare or social sciences is a valuable resource for research and automated analysis. However, responsible data sharing requires the detection and removal of personally identifiable and sensitive information to protect individual privacy. To support the development and evaluation of automatic de-identification systems, we present DialogPII, a multilingual dataset of synthetic dialogs and speech-derived transcripts for personal information detection. DialogPII covers eight interaction scenarios (emergency calls, medical anamnesis interviews, therapy sessions, insurance communication, customer support, clinical interviews regarding an AI-supported dashboard, police reports, and group therapy discussions), 19 entity types, and 11 languages (English, Arabic, Finnish, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Polish, Portuguese, Spanish, and Turkish). Dialogs were generated semi-automatically using large language models, manually curated for plausibility and diversity, and localized to country- and city-specific contexts. All dialogs were additionally converted to speech via text-to-speech synthesis, transcribed with Whisper, and annotated through automatic projection and manual correction, yielding aligned written and speech-derived resources across all languages. We further release baseline multilingual named entity recognition models and provide technical validation through inter-annotator agreement analysis, translation quality evaluation, annotation projection assessment, and benchmark experiments with transformer-based sequence labeling models.

</details>


### [368] [REAR: Test-time Preference Realignment through Reward Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30339)
*Fuxiang Zhang,Pengcheng Wang,Chenran Li,Yi-Chen Li,Yuxin Chen,Lang Feng,Chenfeng Xu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Bo An*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出REAR框架，将奖励函数分解为问题相关和偏好相关两部分，通过线性组合token级log概率实现高效测试时重对齐，无需额外训练即可使LLM适应多样化用户偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法主要集中在可验证领域（如数学、编程），难以应用于偏好对齐任务。后训练方法虽能适配需求，但需要昂贵的数据整理和额外训练。

Method: 将奖励函数分解为问题相关项和偏好信息项，推导出REAR奖励，将其表示为token级log概率的线性组合，与best-of-N采样、树搜索等TTS算法兼容。

Result: 在偏好对齐任务上优于其他测试时基线，还能泛化到数学和视觉任务。

Conclusion: REAR框架实现了可扩展的测试时重对齐，在不需训练的情况下有效对齐LLM与多样化用户偏好，且具有跨任务泛化能力。

Abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with diverse user preferences is a critical yet challenging task. While post-training methods can adapt models to specific needs, they often require costly data curation and additional training. Test-time scaling (TTS) presents an efficient, training-free alternative, but its application has been largely limited to verifiable domains like mathematics and coding, where response correctness is easily judged. To extend TTS to preference alignment, we introduce a novel framework that models the task as a realignment problem, since the base model often fails to sufficiently align with the stated preference. Our key insight is to decompose the underlying reward function into two components: one related to the question and the other to preference information. This allows us to derive a REAlignment Reward (REAR) that selectively rescales the proportions of these two reward terms. We then show that REAR can be formulated as a linear combination of token-level policy log-probabilities, making it computationally efficient and easy to integrate with various TTS algorithms such as best-of-$N$ sampling and tree search. Experiments show that compared to other test-time baselines, REAR not only enables scalable test-time realignment for preference alignment tasks under diverse user requirements, but also generalizes to mathematical and visual tasks under appropriate preference settings.

</details>


### [369] [OLIVE: View-Augmented Latent Prediction with Waveform Reconstruction for Speech SSL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30356)
*Karl El Hajal,Mathew Magimai. -Doss*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OLIVE是一个自监督语音表示学习框架，通过联合优化视图增强掩码潜在预测和波形重建目标，在生成任务、说话人任务和波形重建上表现优异，同时在识别和语义任务上保持竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督语音表示学习方法通常只专注于分析（如掩码预测）或合成（如重建）目标之一，难以同时兼顾下游识别任务和生成任务的需求，作者希望提出一个统一框架来同时优化两个目标。

Method: 提出OLIVE框架，联合优化两个目标：(1) 视图增强的掩码潜在预测（分析目标），用于塑造上下文表示的不变性；(2) 波形重建（合成目标），约束早期编码器特征保留信号级信息。两个目标在统一框架下联合优化。

Result: OLIVE在生成任务和说话人任务上取得改进，在识别和语义任务上保持竞争力，并提升了波形重建质量。

Conclusion: 通过联合优化分析和合成目标，自监督语音表示可以同时支持更广泛的任务，包括生成和识别任务，证明两个目标具有互补性。

Abstract: We propose Online Latent prediction with Invariant Views and rEconstruction (OLIVE), a self-supervised speech representation learning framework that jointly optimizes analysis and synthesis objectives. OLIVE combines view-augmented masked latent prediction with waveform reconstruction under a unified objective. Reconstruction constrains early encoder features to retain signal-level information, while masked latent prediction shapes later contextual representations toward invariance for robust downstream performance. We show that these objectives enable representations that support a broad range of tasks. In particular, OLIVE improves results on generation and speaker tasks, maintains competitive performance on recognition and semantic tasks, and improves waveform reconstruction.

</details>


### [370] [MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30406)
*Wenhan Ma,Jianyu Wei,Liang Zhao,Hailin Zhang,Bangjun Xiao,Lei Li,Qibin Yang,Bofei Gao,Yudong Wang,Rang Li,Jinhao Dong,Zhifang Sui,Fuli Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出多教师在线蒸馏（MOPD）范式，通过领域强化学习教师模型在学生自身 rollout 上蒸馏，实现多能力无缝集成，在 Qwen3-30B-A3B 上优于现有方法，并已部署到工业级模型 MiMo-V2-Flash 的后训练中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型后训练中难以将多个领域的能力高效集成到一个模型里，现有方法（如 Off-Policy Finetune、Mix-RL）要么效率低，要么性能损失大。

Method: 先对每个领域单独进行强化学习训练获得领域教师，然后让学生在自己的 rollout 数据上蒸馏这些教师的知识（在线蒸馏），消除曝光偏差并提供密集优化信号。

Result: 在 Qwen3-30B-A3B 上，MOPD 优于 Mix-RL、Cascade RL、Off-Policy Finetune 和 Param-Merge 基线，几乎继承了每位教师的全部能力，并已成功部署到工业级模型 MiMo-V2-Flash。

Conclusion: MOPD 是一种高效的多能力集成后训练范式，支持领域教师并行独立开发，消除了跨领域耦合，具有工业级实用价值。

Abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into one model remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are either inefficient or lose performance. In this work, we propose Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a post-training paradigm for combining the capabilities of multiple domain RL teachers: we first run per-domain specialised RL to obtain a set of domain teachers, then distill these teachers into the student on its own rollouts. This eliminates exposure bias and provides a dense optimization signal. On Qwen3-30B-A3B, MOPD outperforms Mix-RL, Cascade RL, Off-Policy Finetune, and Param-Merge baselines, inheriting nearly all of each teacher's capability. MOPD also enables parallel, independent development of domain teachers, removing the cross-domain coupling typical of multi-domain post-training. MOPD has been deployed in the post-training of MiMo-V2-Flash, an industrial-scale frontier model, demonstrating its practical value for capability integration in frontier-scale LLMs.

</details>


### [371] [Field Order Should Not Matter: Permutation-Invariant Embedding Model Fine-Tuning for Structured Metadata Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30473)
*Aivin V. Solatorio,Olivier Dupriez,Rafael Macalaba*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出排列不变微调（PI-FT）方法，解决结构化元数据检索中字段序列顺序对检索质量的隐性控制问题，并在开发统计指标目录上构建了多语言基准DevDataBench，验证了该方法在顺序变化下保持稳定性能且优于大型零样本模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在结构化元数据检索中，将记录序列化为字符串时字段顺序的选择会显著影响微调后的检索质量（顺序变化导致nDCG@10下降7.4点）。现有方法将顺序视为实现细节而忽视其控制作用，且缺乏针对低资源语言和未查询指标的训练信号。

Method: 提出PI-FT（permutation-invariant fine-tuning），在每次训练时对每条记录随机采样字段顺序并进行随机字段丢弃，使模型学习绑定字段标签而非位置信息。同时构建DevDataBench，一个完全由LLM生成的多语言（15种语言）基准，覆盖所有指标的接地、面向方面的查询。

Result: PI-FT将顺序变化带来的性能损失从7.4点降至0.2点nDCG@10；微调的118M参数CPU编码器在DevDataBench上超越所有零样本基线（包括text-embedding-3-large），nDCG@10达0.707 vs 0.556，低资源语言提升最大。

Conclusion: 字段顺序在结构化元数据检索中至关重要，PI-FT是一种轻量（仅修改数据加载器两行代码）、有效的解决方案。随着AI助手和智能体越来越多地中介公共数据访问，确保统计指标的可发现性是数据传播的前提条件。

Abstract: We study retrieval over catalogs of structured metadata, where each record is a small schema whose fields answer different kinds of query. Embedding a record with a text encoder first serializes its fields into a string, which forces a choice of field order. We show this choice, usually treated as an implementation detail, silently controls retrieval quality once the encoder is fine-tuned. A standard fine-tune loses 7.4 nDCG@10 points when the index is rebuilt under a different field order, because it reads absolute position instead of the field labels. We propose permutation-invariant fine-tuning ($\textbf{PI-FT}$), which serializes each record under a freshly sampled field order with random field dropout, so meaning binds to the labels rather than to position. The change is about two lines in the data loader; it costs negligible in-distribution accuracy and cuts the order-change penalty to 0.2 points. We study this in the discovery of development statistics, a catalog of nearly 10,000 indicators that should be searchable in many languages by a model small enough to self-host. As AI assistants and agents increasingly mediate access to public data and statistics, this retrieval step decides whether an answer is grounded in the right indicator or series, making discoverability a precondition for disseminating data through AI. Because usage logs cannot provide training signal for indicators no one has searched, we generate the queries instead. $\textbf{DevDataBench}$ is a fully LLM-generated benchmark of grounded, facet-targeted queries across 15 languages, covering every indicator for both training and evaluation. A fine-tuned 118M-parameter CPU encoder outperforms every zero-shot baseline, including $\texttt{text-embedding-3-large}$ (0.707 vs.\ 0.556 nDCG@10), with the largest gains in low-resource languages. We release the benchmark, pipeline, models, and a reusable PI-FT framework.

</details>


### [372] [SIMAX: A Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30491)
*Zhuhan Bao,Rui Yang,Bohao Yang,Zhiyi Liu,Sicheng Shu,Ruio Heerschap,Le Li,Doris Yang,Elisabeth Bond,Haoyuan Wang,Nicoleta Economou-Zavlanos,Joshua M. Biro,Matthew McDermott,Nan Liu,Anand Chowdhury,Kai Sun,Kathryn Pollak,Ed Hammond,Chuan Hong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SIMAX是一个用于生成可控、可复现的医患对话模拟数据的框架，支持多保真度注释，为临床沟通编码系统的开发与评估提供数据基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有临床对话数据的获取（真实对话录音）和人工编码成本高、不一致、难以规模化，亟需一种能生成带参考行为标注的可控对话数据的方法，以支持AI驱动的沟通编码系统的开发与评估。

Method: 提出SIMAX框架，基于预定义的临床场景、人物角色、语音条件和目标沟通行为，利用Global Codebook（整体沟通质量）和WISER Codebook（具体可计数行为）两个编码手册控制对话中的行为生成。

Result: 生成了3,388个模拟对话（覆盖3个专科、多个就诊阶段、角色特征和口音条件）；自动评估显示语音自然度中等（UTMOS=3.03, WV-MOS=2.61）、转录保真度高（WER=0.07, CER=0.05）、文本-音频对应良好（CLAP=0.41）；人工评估中位MOS=4.67，临床真实感中位=3.00；下游评估表明SIMAX能检测编码系统在部分维度上的灵敏度不足。

Conclusion: SIMAX能够生成可控且可复现的模拟医患对话，为临床沟通编码系统的开发、验证和优化提供可靠的数据基础。

Abstract: Background. The widespread deployment of ambient digital scribes is driving large-scale capture of clinician-patient dialogues. Human coding of clinical communication data remains costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale, motivating AI-driven communication coding systems. However, evaluating these systems requires real-world dialogues and human-coded labels, both hard to obtain at scale.
  Methods. We developed SIMAX (Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation), a framework for generating controlled clinical dialogue data with reference behavioral annotations. SIMAX generates clinician-patient dialogues from predefined clinical scenarios, personas and voice conditions, and target communication behaviors. Behaviors are controlled using two codebooks: the Global Codebook for overall communication quality and the WISER Codebook for specific countable behaviors. We evaluated SIMAX using automated and human quality assessments and an example communication coding system.
  Results. SIMAX generated 3,388 simulated dialogues across three specialties, multiple visit stages, persona characteristics, and accent conditions. Automated assessment showed mean UTMOS and WV-MOS scores of 3.03 and 2.61, WER and CER of 0.07 and 0.05, and CLAP cosine similarity of 0.41, suggesting reasonable speech naturalness, high transcription fidelity, and positive text-audio correspondence. Human evaluation showed a median MOS of 4.67 and a median clinical realism score of 3.00. Downstream evaluation suggests that SIMAX can assess how a communication coding system responds to behavioral targets and reveal insufficient sensitivity in some dimensions.
  Conclusions. SIMAX generates controlled and reproducible simulated clinician-patient dialogues, providing a data foundation for developing, validating, and refining communication coding systems.

</details>


### [373] [Regime-Aware Peer Specialization for Robust RAG under Heterogeneous Knowledge Conflicts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30518)
*Bo Wang,Heyan Huang,Yaolin Li,Yanghao Zhou,Jiahao Teng,Ziyi Yang,Ge Shi,Chong Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出RAPS-DA，一种面向检索增强生成中上下文与模型知识冲突的"按机制特异化"框架。通过样本级三机制划分（Grounding/Arbitration/Resistance）训练三个同规模专家，配合硬路由分配；以及token级双层选择器过滤无用token并聚焦高冲突区域。实验表明该方法超越多种基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG系统中检索到的上下文可能与模型参数知识冲突（可靠/部分可靠/对抗性），现有方法用机制无关的监督处理这种异质冲突，混叠了不相容的学习信号。因此需要一种能解耦不同冲突信号的方法。

Method: 提出RAPS-DA框架：(1) 样本级：将冲突分为Grounding（可靠）、Arbitration（部分可靠）、Resistance（对抗）三个机制，从共享基座模型训练三个同规模专家，每个样本硬路由到匹配的专家进行on-policy reverse-KL监督；(2) Token级：双层选择器利用教师间分歧、学生-教师分歧和学生熵，过滤无信息/不稳定token，加权自信但错配的token，逐渐聚焦高冲突token。学生部署时无需机制标签或访问专家。

Result: 在五个冲突场景和两个OOD基准上，RAPS-DA超越了所有提示、解码、微调、强化学习和单教师基线方法。

Conclusion: 收益源自固定模型规模下的专门化（而非更强的教师），且专家仅在训练时存在，部署轻量。该方法有效解耦了不同冲突机制下的学习信号。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves language models by grounding generation in external context. However, it can be fragile when the retrieved context conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Such conflicts span a reliability spectrum, ranging from reliable and partially reliable evidence to adversarial context. Existing remedies often handle such heterogeneous conflicts with regime-agnostic supervision, which can conflate incompatible learning signals across reliability regimes. To disentangle these signals, we propose RAPS-DA, a regime-aware peer specialization framework that addresses conflict at two complementary granularities. At the sample level, conflicts are divided into three regimes, including Grounding, Arbitration, and Resistance, with one same-scale peer specialist trained per regime from a shared base model. Each sample is then hard-routed to its regime-matched peer for on-policy reverse-KL supervision. At the token level, a dual-layer selector uses inter-teacher disagreement, student-teacher divergence, and student entropy to filter uninformative or unstable tokens, upweight confidently misaligned ones, and gradually focus supervision on high-conflict tokens as the student matures. Gains stem from specialization at a fixed model scale, not from a stronger teacher, and the peer specialists exist only during training, so the deployed student requires no regime labels or peer access. Experiments on five conflict scenarios and two out-of-distribution benchmarks show RAPS-DA surpasses all prompting, decoding, fine-tuning, RL, and single-teacher baselines.

</details>


### [374] [TRACE: Temporal Relationship-Aware Conversational Entrainment Detection in Dyadic Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30543)
*Sathvik Manikantan Napa Ugandhar,Hao Zhang,Alison Gunzler,Yuzhe Wang,Thomas Thebaud,Georgi Tinchev,Venkatesh Ravichandran,Laureano Moro-Velázquez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出DyadEE数据集（用于检测双人语音交互中的情绪同步）和TRACE框架（基于窗口级情感微调Whisper嵌入建模交互轨迹），在情绪同步检测任务上达到97.01%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语音AI智能体的普及，理解对话交互中的情绪同步（emotional entrainment）变得越来越重要，而情绪同步受到社会关系和对话上下文的影响。

Method: 构建DyadEE数据集（包含真实情绪同步对话和通过交换对话伙伴+情感重合成破坏同步的合成交互），提出TRACE窗口级框架，将双人交互建模为基于情感微调Whisper声学嵌入的有序序列，将每个样本视为交互轨迹而非聚合的 utterances。

Result: 在DyadEE数据集上，引入对话上下文和关系信息能提升情绪同步检测效果，TRACE框架达到97.01%的最佳准确率。

Conclusion: 对话上下文和关系信息对情绪同步检测有显著帮助，TRACE框架有效建模了交互轨迹中的情感协调。

Abstract: With the proliferation of speech AI agents, understanding emotional entrainment in conversational interaction has become increasingly important. Emotional entrainment is shaped by social relationships and conversational context, influencing affective coordination over time. We introduce DyadEE, a dataset for emotional entrainment detection in dyadic speech interactions, containing both emotionally entrained conversations and synthetic interactions where entrainment is disrupted through partner swapping and emotion resynthesis. We further propose TRACE, a window-level framework that models dyadic interaction as ordered sequences of acoustic embeddings derived from emotion fine-tuned Whisper representations, treating each sample as an interaction trace rather than pooled utterances. Experimental results on DyadEE show that incorporating conversational context and relationship information improves emotional entrainment detection, with TRACE achieving the best accuracy of 97.01%.

</details>


### [375] [Poller: Are LLMs Suitable for Evaluating the Poetry Understanding Task?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30556)
*Shanshan Wang,Derek F. Wong,Jingming Yao,Lidia S. Chao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Poller方法，利用大语言模型模拟诗人视角进行现代中国诗歌评估，在八个专门维度上实现了评估误差的大幅降低（修辞技巧误差降低94.55%，陌生化误差降低89.53%），为诗歌自动化评估建立了新基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自动评估方法不适用于现代中国诗歌，人工评估虽可靠但成本高、不适用于大规模数据，因此需要一种兼顾效率与专业性的自动化诗歌评估方法。

Method: 提出Poller（Poetry LLM Evaluator）方法，要求大语言模型扮演诗歌作者的角色，通过提供详细背景信息模拟人类从诗人视角进行判断和评估。

Result: 在多个大语言模型上进行了全面实验，在八个专门维度上评估诗歌解读。结果显示Poller有效降低了LLM与人类之间的评估误差，修辞技巧维度误差降低94.55%，陌生化维度误差降低89.53%，传统LLM评估方法无法达到此性能。

Conclusion: 该方法弥合了自动化效率与人类专业知识之间的差距，为诗歌相关任务的自动化评估建立了基础。

Abstract: Traditional automatic evaluation methods have been shown to be unsuitable for modern Chinese poetry because of the distinct nature of this literary genre. Human evaluation remains reliable, but is expensive and not applicable to large-scale data. In this paper, we propose Poller (Poetry LLM Evaluator), a novel method leveraging large language models (LLMs) to evaluate the poetry understanding task. Specifically, our method requires LLMs to play the role of a poem's author with detailed information, thereby emulating human evaluation and judgment by adopting the poet's perspective. We conducted comprehensive experiments on multiple LLMs, evaluating the interpretations of poems across eight specialized dimensions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively reduces the evaluation error between LLMs and humans. Especially for specific dimension evaluation, Poller-based LLMs achieve a 94.55% and 89.53% error reduction for rhetorical techniques and defamiliarization, respectively, compared to baseline methods. These performances are unattainable by conventional LLM evaluation methods. Experimental results from multiple LLMs across various dimensions validate the efficacy of our method. This work bridges the gap between automated efficiency and human expertise, establishing a foundation for automated evaluation in poetry-related tasks.

</details>


### [376] [Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30562)
*Disen Lan,Jianbin Zheng,Yuxi Ren,Xin Xia,Xuanda Wang,Xuefeng Xiao,Xipeng Qiu,Yu Cheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出FlashMorph方法，通过将层选择建模为预算约束的子集优化问题，利用可学习的门控机制和线性化正则化，实现从全注意力Transformer到混合注意力模型的高效层选择转换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合注意力模型的层选择方法通常依赖启发式策略（如固定位置模式或逐层评分），将各层重要性视为孤立因素，忽略了全局混合配置下各层之间的相互依赖效应。

Method: 先将每个全注意力层配备一个线性注意力分支构建可变形模型，冻结所有权重并在合成长上下文检索数据上联合优化逐层门控，通过线性化正则化鼓励模型依赖线性注意力。然后根据预设预算离散化门控，最后进行logits蒸馏和长上下文微调。

Result: FlashMorph能发现更有效的混合配置，在保持强长上下文召回和通用基准性能的同时，显著降低了层选择成本。

Conclusion: FlashMorph在有效性、效率和可扩展性上均优于现有层选择方法。

Abstract: Hybrid attention models improve long-context efficiency by retaining only a subset of full-attention layers and replacing the remaining layers with linear attention. However, the effectiveness of Transformer-to-hybrid conversion critically depends on which layers preserve full attention. Existing hybrid layer selection methods typically rely on heuristic strategies such as fixed placement patterns or layerwise scoring, implicitly treating layer importance as isolated and overlooking the interdependent layer effect under a global hybrid configuration. In this work, we formulate hybrid layer selection as a budget-constrained subset optimization problem. We further propose FlashMorph (Fast LAyer Selection for Hybrid MORPHing), an effective, efficient and scalable layer selection method for Transformer-to-hybrid conversion. FlashMorph first constructs a morphable model by equipping each full-attention layer with a converted linear-attention branch. It then freezes all model weights and jointly optimizes layerwise gates on synthetic long-context retrieval data, with a linearization regularization that encourages the model to rely on linear attention for efficiency. The learned gates are discretized under a preset full-attention budget to instantiate the hybrid architecture, followed by standard logits distillation and long-context finetuning. Extensive experiments show that FlashMorph discovers more effective hybrid configurations, preserves strong long-context recall and general benchmark performance while substantially reducing layer selection cost compared with existing layer selection methods, demonstrating its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

</details>


### [377] [Uncertainty-Aware Generation and Decision-Making Under Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30578)
*Nico Daheim,Iryna Gurevych*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了在复杂主观任务（如辅导和自动同行评审）中，如何基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策，结合不确定性感知算法来提升LLM决策质量，并使用保形预测提供策略保证。实验发现贝叶斯方法效果较好，而风险规避规则可能因生成过于通用的输出而降低性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM能力快速提升并被用于复杂任务，但这些任务往往具有主观性和对信任度的要求，而决策算法方面的进展相对较少，因此需要开发更好的不确定性感知决策方法。

Method: 基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策，提出不确定性感知决策算法；在辅导和自动同行评审任务中，考虑策略和评分的不确定性；使用保形预测为策略和分数提供保证。

Result: 这些算法在多数情况下能提升生成结果的效用，但在高模糊性场景下需要谨慎实现。风险规避规则可能因优化过于通用的输出而退化性能，而贝叶斯方法表现更好。

Conclusion: 决策理论技术可用于改进LLM决策，但仍有开放性挑战待解决。

Abstract: With rapidly improving capabilities, Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in many complex real-world tasks. Beyond requiring in-depth knowledge and reasoning skills, many of these tasks exhibit a high degree of subjectivity and require that the outputs of the model can be trusted. While a lot of progress has been made to train better models, decision-making algorithms have received less attention. In this work, we present and evaluate various uncertainty-aware decision-making algorithms based on Bayesian decision theory and risk-averse decision making on the tasks of tutoring and automatic peer reviewing. Concretely, we take uncertainty over tutoring strategies and review scores into account when generating a tutor response or review and use conformal prediction to provide guarantees over strategy and score. We find empirically that these algorithms can improve the utility of the generations but need to be carefully implemented when ambiguity is high. For example, risk-averse rules can degrade performance by optimizing for generic outputs, while Bayesian methods tend to perform better. Our work uses techniques from decision theory to improve LLM-based decision-making and outlines open challenges for the community.

</details>


### [378] [Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30616)
*Lei Bai,Zongsheng Cao,Yang Chen,Zhiyao Cui,Shangheng Du,Yue Fan,Shiyang Feng,Zijie Guo,Haonan He,Liang He,Xiaohan He,Shuyue Hu,Yusong Hu,Songtao Huang,Yichen Jiang,Hao Li,Xin Li,Dahua Lin,Weihao Lin,Fenghua Ling,Dongrui Liu,Zhuo Liu,Runmin Ma,Chunjiang Mu,Haoyang Peng,Tianshuo Peng,Jinxin Shi,Luohe Shi,Boyuan Sun,Zelin Tan,Shengji Tang,Qianyi Wang,Yiming Wu,Yi Xie,Xiangchao Yan,Jingqi Ye,Peng Ye,Fangchen Yu,Jiakang Yuan,Bihao Zhan,Bo Zhang,Chen Zhang,Shufei Zhang,Shuaiyu Zhang,Wenlong Zhang,Yiqun Zhang,Junpeng Zhao,Zhijie Zhong,Bowen Zhou,Yuhao Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Agents-A1，一种35B参数混合专家智能体模型，通过扩展智能体轨迹长度和异构能力，在多个长时域基准上达到万亿参数级模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究智能体水平（agent horizon）缩放的两个维度：长时域轨迹缩放和异构智能体能力缩放，旨在用35B小模型匹配万亿参数模型在长时域任务上的表现。

Method: 三阶段训练法：1）全领域监督微调对齐基础模型；2）训练领域级教师模型捕获专业知识；3）多教师领域路由在线蒸馏+显著词汇对齐，统一6个异构领域到一个学生模型。构建了平均45K tokens的长时域知识-动作基础设施。

Result: 在SEAL-0（56.4）、IFBench（80.6）、HiPhO（46.4）、FrontierScience-Olympiad（79.0）、MolBench-Bind（56.8）上领先Kimi-K2.6和DeepSeek-V4-pro等1T模型；在SciCode（44.3）、HLE（47.6）、BrowseComp（75.5）上具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 证明了通过扩展智能体水平，35B模型可以达到或匹配万亿参数模型在长时域任务上的性能，为社区提供了实用的缩放路径。

Abstract: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions, observations, and verifier outcomes, producing agentic trajectories with an average length of 45K tokens. Based on this, we train Agents-A1 with a three-stage recipe. First, we perform full-domain supervised fine-tuning to align the base model with broad agentic behaviors. Second, we train domain-level teacher models to capture specialized expertise in each domain. Third, we propose a multi-teacher domain-routed on-policy distillation with salient vocabulary alignment to improve knowledge transfer efficiency across different domains, unifying six heterogeneous domains into one deployable student model. Agents-A1 achieves strong and broad performance for long-horizon agent benchmarks. Compared with 1T-parameter model such as Kimi-K2.6 and DeepSeek-V4-pro, Agents-A1 achieves leading results on SEAL-0 (56.4), IFBench (80.6), HiPhO (46.4), FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0), and MolBench-Bind (56.8), and remains highly competitive on SciCode (44.3), HLE (47.6) and BrowseComp (75.5). We hope this work provides the community with a practical path for scaling the horizon using a 35B agent that can reach or match the performance of 1T models on long-horizon tasks.

</details>


### [379] [ReFreeKV: Towards Threshold-Free KV Cache Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16886)
*Xuanfan Ni,Liyan Xu,Chenyang Lyu,Longyue Wang,Mo Yu,Lemao Liu,Fandong Meng,Jie Zhou,Piji Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ReFreeKV，一种免阈值的KV缓存压缩方法，能自适应调整预算分配，在13个数据集上验证了其在不损失性能的前提下有效降低LLM推理内存消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KV缓存剪枝方法依赖输入相关的阈值来预分配预算，这在开放域场景下难以适用，因为输入领域、长度和难度差异大，阈值选择边界模糊，导致性能大幅下降。

Method: 提出"免阈值"(threshold-free)的新目标，让方法自适应调整预算分配同时保持全缓存性能；ReFreeKV作为该目标的首个实例化方法。

Result: 在13个涵盖不同上下文长度、任务类型和模型大小的数据集上验证了ReFreeKV的有效性和高效性。

Conclusion: ReFreeKV通过消除对输入特定阈值的依赖，实现了更鲁棒的KV缓存压缩，适用于开放域真实场景。

Abstract: To reduce memory consumption during LLM inference, a handful of methods have been proposed for KV cache pruning. While these techniques can accomplish lossless memory reduction on many datasets, they often hinge on an under-emphasized condition: an input/domain-specific threshold for KV cache budget needs to be pre-determined to achieve the optimal performance. However, such input-sensitive design may be considerably limited in real-world scenarios, as open-domain inputs span diverse domains, lengths and difficulty levels, without clear boundaries for threshold selection. As a result, the dependence of such input-sensitive threshold can be a fundamental limitation that causes large degradation on arbitrary inputs. In this work, we propose a new objective that lifts the threshold constraints for robust KV compression, advocating for "threshold-free" methods that adaptively adjust budget allocation while preserving full-cache performance. We then propose a novel method, ReFreeKV, serving as the first instantiation of this objective. Extensive experiments across 13 datasets with diverse context lengths, task types, and model sizes demonstrate its efficacy and efficiency. Our code is publicly released at https://github.com/Patrick-Ni/ReFreeKV.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [380] [Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28374)
*Michael Nguyen,Quoc Nguyen,Paul Vuong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出RSEA，一种递归自进化智能体，通过三层自然语言状态（策略、技能、剧本）和严格保留-改进门控机制实现安全进化。实验表明无工件能普遍获胜，未加门控的上下文进化风险高，而RSEA的严格保留选择确保了单调安全进化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体进化方法（如反思、工作流、优化提示等）通常在单一基准上报告正向结果，缺乏跨方法的公平对比，且未充分关注进化过程的安全性和稳定性。

Method: RSEA维护三层自然语言状态：策略层（指令性策略）、技能层（可复用技能）、剧本层（程序性剧本）。每次迭代中，智能体从自身轨迹重写三层内容，并通过严格保留-改进门控（keep-better gate）在独立保留集上评估候选，仅当不退化时接受更新。

Result: 在ALFWorld、GAIA、(τ)-bench、WebShop四个基准上，RSEA在ALFWorld上达到69.3%（单次推理最佳），带重试达79.4%；但AWM在强骨干工具任务上最优。未加门控的Dynamic Cheatsheet在ALFWorld达70.7%，但在WebShop上崩溃（0.14 vs ReAct 0.43）。RSEA在任何基准上均未显著低于基础智能体。

Conclusion: 没有一种工件能普遍最优；不加保护的上下文进化存在高方差和风险；RSEA的严格保留-改进选择机制是实现递归自进化单调安全的关键，能在不退化前提下稳定提升性能。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly improved without weight updates by evolving a natural-language artifact, such as reflections, workflows, playbooks, cheatsheets, or optimized prompts, that conditions a frozen policy. Such methods are typically reported as wins on the single benchmark where they help. We study them apples-to-apples and surface a sharper picture. We introduce RSEA, a Recursive Self-Evolving Agent that carries a compact three-layer natural-language state: an imperative strategy, reusable skills, and a procedural playbook. Across generations, RSEA rewrites all three layers from its own trajectories and commits a candidate only if it does not regress on a disjoint held-out split, using a strict keep-better gate.
  Across four diverse benchmarks, ALFWorld, GAIA, (τ)-bench, and WebShop, and six faithful baselines, ReAct, Reflexion, GEPA, AWM, ACE, and Dynamic Cheatsheet, all evaluated on one shared local backbone, we find three main results. First, no artifact universally wins. RSEA is the strongest single-pass method on ALFWorld, reaching 69.3% compared with 64.6% for ReAct (McNemar (p=0.015)), and reaches 79.4% with retry, the best overall result. However, concrete-workflow induction, represented by AWM, is best on the strong-backbone tool-use tasks. Second, unguarded context evolution is high-variance and unsafe. Dynamic Cheatsheet, which curates context online without a held-out gate, is near-best on ALFWorld at 70.7%, yet collapses on WebShop, with a score of 0.14 compared with 0.43 for ReAct. Third, RSEA's strict held-out selection is what makes recursive self-evolution monotone-safe: it never significantly underperforms the base agent on any benchmark and falls back to vanilla ReAct when evolved context would hurt.

</details>


### [381] [Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28471)
*Zhixuan Li,Jiangan Yuan,Han Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"能力切片"概念，构建了一个从评测失败到数据干预的闭环框架，通过两个案例验证了其有效性与可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM预训练中模型能力是核心变量但不可直接观测，评测与数据之间语言不兼容（benchmark名/样本正确性 vs 数据源/领域/质量标签），工程师只能凭直觉推断失败原因，缺乏系统化方法。

Method: 提出"能力切片"：一组共享背景条件、任务类型、求解操作和输出约束的评测样本。基于此构建评测分类法、非指令数据分类法和映射规则，形成从benchmark级失败到可测试数据干预的闭环。

Result: 案例一：持续预训练导致BBH下降46.82%，诊断发现是<eos>掩码损失问题而非推理能力弱化，修复后BBH回升至66.44；案例二：数学推理弱项通过求解操作分解为具体失败组合，针对性采样使AIME2025/2026 Pass@128从6.67/0.00提升至26.67。

Conclusion: 该框架在方向相反的两个案例中得出正确结论，表明评测到数据的推断可以是常规化、可审计、可实验验证的，而非凭直觉判断。

Abstract: Model capability is the central variable in LLM pre-training, yet is never observed directly: data shapes it prospectively, while evaluation reveals it only retrospectively, compressing samples, prompts, decoding, and scoring rules into one noisy score. Practical optimization runs this backward: a failure is observed first, and the engineer must infer the corpus fix. The two sides speak incompatible vocabularies -- benchmark names and per-sample correctness versus data sources, domains, and quality labels -- so this inference is usually intuition, not method. We close this gap with the \emph{capability slice}: a group of evaluation samples sharing background condition, task type, solving operation, and output constraint -- precise enough to localize a single weakness yet stable enough to survive aggregation, unlike a benchmark name, too coarse, or a single sample, too noisy. Built around this unit, an evaluation taxonomy, a non-instruction data taxonomy, and mapping rules form a closed loop turning a benchmark-level failure into a targeted, testable data intervention. We test this loop on two case studies pulling in opposite directions. First, the loop rules the data out: continued pre-training drives BBH down by $-46.82\%$, but diagnosis traces this to a single masked \texttt{\textless EOS\textgreater} loss rather than weakened reasoning; restoring it recovers BBH to $66.44$, above the original checkpoint, without changing the data. Second, the loop rules the data in: a persistent math-reasoning weakness is decomposed by solving operation into specific failing combinations, and a weakness-targeted sampling procedure built from it lifts AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128 from $6.67$/$0.00$ to $26.67$ each. The same unmodified loop reaches opposite, correct verdicts in both cases, showing the evaluation-to-data inference can be routine, auditable, and experimentally validated rather than intuitive.

</details>


### [382] [GPTNT: Benchmarking Real-Time Collaboration Between Multimodal Agents on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28514)
*Amit Parekh,Sabrina McCallum,Kareem Al-Hasan,Malvina Nikandrou,Alessandro Suglia,Ioannis Konstas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了GPTNT基准，基于合作游戏《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》评估多模态模型在真实协作场景（实时异步交流、信息不对称、时间压力）下的表现。当前最先进的闭源和开源模型均无法在实时游戏中拆解任何炸弹，而人类玩家可以做到。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准大多孤立地测试多模态模型的组件能力（如视觉、语言推理），但真正的协作涉及时间压力、信息不对称、不完美通信等多种条件同时存在，现有评估方法无法衡量模型的协作性能。

Method: 基于合作游戏《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》构建GPTNT基准：两个智能体必须协作拆除程序生成的炸弹谜题。一个智能体可以看见并操作炸弹但没有拆弹指令，另一个智能体拥有指令但看不到炸弹。智能体需要实时异步通信，且可通过隔离指令手册、隔离同伴等方式区分模型是即兴发挥还是依赖记忆。

Result: 所有测试的闭源和开源模型均无法在实时游戏中拆除任何炸弹，而人类玩家可以。通过控制实验，识别出模型在状态追踪、时间压力下的高效行动、歧义处理和错误恢复等方面存在关键弱点。

Conclusion: GPTNT是一个具有挑战性的协作性能基准，能够测量当前评估体系忽视的维度。由于基于真实游戏运行，受益于程序化生成和活跃的模组社区，基准可以随模型进步而演化，不会一次性被解决后废弃。

Abstract: Multimodal models are increasingly deployed to solve tasks collaboratively with humans or other artificial agents. Existing benchmarks show that these models possess many of the required component capabilities, but the conditions that coincide in collaboration, including time pressure, information asymmetry, and imperfect communication, are usually studied in isolation. We introduce GPTNT, a benchmark built on the cooperative video game Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes, in which two agents must coordinate to defuse procedurally generated bomb puzzles against a live countdown. One agent can see and manipulate the bomb but does not have the defusal instructions; the other has the instructions but cannot see or manipulate the bomb. Neither agent can succeed alone: success requires effective and efficient communication. Unlike turn-based proxies, GPTNT requires agents to act asynchronously and communicate in real time. GPTNT is designed to separate collaboration from reliance on memorized solutions: the instruction manual, the partner, or both can be withheld to isolate what a model derives in the moment from what it already knows. We show that GPTNT poses a substantial challenge for state-of-the-art systems: none of the closed- or open-source models we test defuses a single bomb in real time, a bar that human players clear. Through controlled experiments, we identify critical weaknesses in state tracking, efficient action under time pressure, ambiguity handling, and error recovery. We release GPTNT as a benchmark for collaborative performance that current evaluations leave unmeasured. Because it runs on the real game, GPTNT benefits from procedural generation and inherits a living modding community, allowing the benchmark to evolve as models improve rather than being solved once and retired.

</details>


### [383] [IMCBench: A benchmark for multimodal LLMs in Image-grounded Medical Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28556)
*Maria Xenochristou,Ashutosh Joshi,Korosh Vatanparvar,Mohammad Abuzar Hashemi,Prasad Kasu,Deepak Bansal,Anchal Nema,Nivedita Wadhwa,Prashams S Jain,Rebecca Abraham,Will Kimbrough,Dilek Hakkani-Tur,Wilko Schulz-Mahlendorf*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: IMCBench是一个面向多轮医疗对话的多模态基准，结合真实临床图像和合成患者档案，评估模型在安全、准确和不确定性表达三个维度的表现。Claude Opus 4.6综合最佳，但所有模型在恶性和罕见疾病上安全性能下降，且准确描述不等于安全指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学AI基准存在碎片化问题：有的支持多轮对话但缺少图像，有的提供多模态输入但仅聚焦单轮问答，缺少一个同时包含图像和多轮对话的综合性医疗评估基准。

Method: 构建IMCBench基准，使用真实公开临床图像与合成患者档案模拟医患对话；采用LLM-as-Jury评分（1-5分制），经临床专家标注校准；在四个模型家族（Claude、GPT、Nova、Llama）的八个前沿多模态模型上评测，涵盖安全、准确和不确定性表达三个维度。

Result: Claude Opus 4.6总评最高（3.61），其次为Claude Sonnet 4.6（3.30）和GPT-5.2（3.29）；所有模型在恶性和罕见疾病上安全性下降（各-0.27）；消融实验显示视觉输入和EHR上下文移除后安全评分分别下降0.18和0.23。

Conclusion: 准确的临床描述并不能保证安全的患者指导，医 疗AI评估需要建立多维度评价框架。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models and vision-language models have enabled reasoning over multimodal data, offering opportunities for clinical applications such as decision support and triaging. However, existing medical AI benchmarks are fragmented: some support multi-turn dialogues but lack images, while others provide multimodal inputs but focus on single-turn QA tasks. To address this gap, we introduce IMCBench, an image-grounded, multi-turn medical conversation benchmark that pairs real, publicly available clinical images with synthetic patient profiles to simulate realistic patient-clinician interactions. Each conversation is evaluated across three clinical dimensions: safety, accuracy, and appropriate use of uncertainty in diagnosis. We benchmark eight multimodal frontier models across four model families (Claude, GPT, Nova, and Llama), scoring each on a 1-5 scale using LLM-as-Jury scoring calibrated against expert clinician annotations. Our results show that Claude Opus 4.6 achieves the highest overall score (3.61), followed by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (3.30) and GPT-5.2 (3.29), though no model dominates all dimensions and safety degrades for both malignant and rare conditions ($Δ$ = -0.27 each). Ablation studies further reveal that both visual input and EHR context contribute to safe guidance (safety drops of 0.18 and 0.23 on average when each is removed), with stronger models leveraging visual features more effectively. Together, these findings demonstrate that accurate clinical description does not guarantee safe patient guidance, motivating the need for multi-dimensional evaluation frameworks in medical AI.

</details>


### [384] [Search for Truth from Reasoning: A Dynamic Representation Editing Framework for Steering LLM Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28589)
*Tianlong Wang,Yuhang Wang,Weibin Liao,Xin Gao,Xinyu Ma,Yang Lin,Yasha Wang,Liantao Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DynaSteer，一种动态表示编辑框架，通过挖掘推理链中的真值几何特性（句子级编码、不确定性原理、衰减效应），利用模式聚类和Fisher-LDA净化真值，并基于前瞻熵动态干预推理轨迹，在MATH数学推理和跨领域编码任务上取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有增强LLM推理的方法（如CoT、"Wait"提示）主要鼓励模型"多思考"，但缺乏对"真理"的引导。表示编辑（RepE）虽提供内在控制，但尚未应用于动态推理轨迹。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索推理链中真理的几何特性，并实现有效的动态干预。

Method: DynaSteer包含三步：1）模式聚类（Pattern Clustering）解耦推理流形；2）Fisher-LDA投影提纯真理表示；3）动态监测前瞻熵（Lookahead Entropy），在必要时选择性引导或回滚推理轨迹，实现精准干预。

Result: 在多个MATH基准测试上验证了DynaSteer的有效性，并在跨领域编码任务上证实了其泛化能力。

Conclusion: DynaSteer通过动态、精准的表示编辑，在推理链中引导模型走向真理，优于现有方法，且具备良好的泛化性。

Abstract: Current approaches to enhance Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, such as Chain-of-Thought and "Wait" prompts, primarily encourage models to think more, yet often fail to guide them toward Truth. While Representation Editing (RepE) offers a intrinsic control, its application to dynamic reasoning trajectories remains underexplored. In this work, we bridge this gap by investigating the geometry of truth within unfolding reasoning chains. We uncover three critical insights: (1) Truth is encoded at the sentence level and is entangled with latent reasoning patterns; (2) Effective intervention follows an Uncertainty Principle and a Decay Effect, requiring localization to early, high-entropy forks; (3) Naive steering vectors suffer from noise, risking collateral damage to correct trajectories. Based on these findings, we propose DynaSteer, a dynamic RepE framework. DynaSteer employs pattern clustering to disentangle reasoning manifolds and utilizes Fisher-LDA to project purified truth. By dynamically monitoring lookahead entropy, it selectively steers and rolls back trajectories only when necessary. Comprehensive experimental results on several MATH benchmark verify the effectiveness of DynaSteer, and experiments on out-of-domain coding tasks further confirm its generalization ability. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tianlwang/DynaSteer.

</details>


### [385] [Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28683)
*Ioannis Tzachristas,John Pavlopoulos*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出VirtueMap框架，基于亚里士多德美德伦理学评估LLM在伦理困境中的决策偏好，通过排序响应并计算美德画像，发现九大LLM家族在勇气、节制和正义维度差异最大，平均排序一致性达90.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在伦理困境中往往面临多个合理但优先权不同的回答（如公平vs诚实），传统单一答案评估无法刻画这种伦理权衡。作者希望引入美德伦理学视角，系统描述LLM在不同美德维度上的偏好模式。

Method: 1. 设计7个非致命、非政治、非宗教的伦理困境，每个困境提供5个候选回答；2. 针对每个困境和美德（实践智慧、正义、诚实、勇气、节制），人工给出美德排序参考，并经95%以上验证者确认；3. 使用归一化Borda对齐算法计算排名分数；4. 对9个LLM家族进行重复运行评估。

Result: LLM在排序一致性上平均高达90.3%，最大的差异出现在勇气（Courage）、节制（Temperance）和正义（Justice）维度。研究还发布了交互式网站，支持本地计算美德画像并与LLM画像对比。

Conclusion: VirtueMap有效揭示了LLM在不同美德维度上的系统性偏好差异，为理解和评估AI伦理决策提供了可量化的框架工具。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often face ethical tradeoffs in which several responses may be defensible but express different priorities, such as fairness, honesty, courage, or restraint. We introduce VirtueMap, a framework for describing these patterns through an Aristotelian virtue-ethics lens. Instead of asking for a single correct answer, VirtueMap asks humans or LLMs to rank all five responses to each of seven general, non-lethal, non-political, and non-religious ethical dilemmas. To define the reference orderings used for scoring, we first proposed, for each dilemma and virtue, an ordering of the five responses from most to least expressive of that virtue. We then collected more than 100 respondent evaluations per ordering and retained it as operational ground truth only when at least 95% confirmed it. Rankings are scored against these retained orderings using normalized Borda alignment, yielding profiles over Practical Wisdom, Justice, Truthfulness, Courage, and Temperance. We apply VirtueMap to nine LLM families in a repeated-run evaluation and find high mean rank consistency (90.3%), with the largest differences appearing on Courage, Temperance, and Justice. We also release an interactive website that computes profiles locally in the browser and compares respondents with measured LLM profiles.

</details>


### [386] [An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28692)
*Shanghua Gao,Ayush Noori,Richard Zhu,Curtis Ginder,Zhenglun Kong,Xiaorui Su,Justin Kauffman,Benjamin S. Glicksberg,Joshua Lampert,Ankit Sakhuja,Ashwin Sawant,ATHENA-R1 Evaluation Consortium,David A. Clifton,Noa Dagan,Ran Balicer,Marinka Zitnik*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ATHENA-R1是一个基于强化学习的AI治疗推理智能体，覆盖1939年以来所有FDA批准药物。通过两级自我学习框架（多智能体系统构建工具与轨迹 + 强化学习科学反馈），在3,168个药物推理任务和456个患者治疗案例中达到94.7%和82.9%的准确率，超越GPT-5等基线模型，并在专家评估和真实电子健康记录验证中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 治疗推理涉及疾病背景、合并症、药物、禁忌症等多重约束的迭代权衡与证据收集，长期以来对AI极具挑战。现有语言模型和工具使用系统在此任务上表现有限，且缺乏人工标注的训练轨迹。

Method: 构建两级自我学习框架：(1) 多智能体系统自动构建工具、任务和推理轨迹，用于监督微调；(2) 强化学习结合科学反馈（证据收集、工具使用、逻辑非冗余性）来优化推理质量。模型每次迭代识别缺失信息、选择并运行相关工具、整合证据。

Result: 在5个基准测试（3,168个药物推理任务、456个患者治疗案例）上，ATHENA-R1达到94.7%的药物推理准确率和82.9%的治疗推理准确率，比GPT-5分别高出17.8和10.7个百分点。28个罕见病组织专家和医生盲评中均更受青睐。在540万患者电子健康记录中验证的不良事件假设，调整后比值比为1.48-1.84，阴性对照无异常升高。

Conclusion: 治疗推理可以重构为一个可学习的迭代证据收集过程，强化学习能够有效训练AI执行这一任务，从而在复杂临床决策中实现超越通用大模型的表现。

Abstract: Treatment reasoning underpins every therapeutic decision, integrating disease context, comorbidities, medications, contraindications, and evolving biomedical knowledge to select an appropriate therapy. It is inherently iterative: candidates are weighed against many constraints, revised as evidence emerges, and grounded in verifiable sources. Here we introduce ATHENA-R1, an AI agent for treatment reasoning across all FDA approved drugs since 1939, trained by reinforcement learning over a universe of 212 biomedical tools. At each step it identifies missing information, selects and runs relevant tools, and incorporates the evidence. To train it without human-annotated traces, we build a two-level self-learning framework: multi-agent systems construct the tools, tasks, and reasoning trajectories for supervised fine-tuning, then reinforcement learning with scientific feedback rewards reasoning quality (evidence gathering, grounded tool use, logical non-redundancy). Across five benchmarks of 3,168 drug reasoning tasks and 456 patient treatment cases, ATHENA-R1 outperforms language models and tool-use systems, reaching 94.7% accuracy on open-ended drug reasoning and 82.9% on treatment reasoning, 17.8 and 10.7 points above GPT-5. In blinded evaluations by experts from 28 rare disease organizations, it is preferred over reference models on all criteria, and physicians rated it favorably on complex hospitalized cardiovascular and infectious-disease cases. Adverse-event hypotheses it generated, tested in electronic health records from 5.4 million patients, reached adjusted odds ratios of 1.48-1.84, with no elevation among negative controls. Because it requires knowing what evidence to seek before concluding, treatment reasoning has long been hard for AI; we show it can be reframed as a learnable process of iterative evidence gathering that reinforcement learning can train AI to perform.

</details>


### [387] [COMPASS: Grounding Composition-Intent Guidance in Unified Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28696)
*Ziqi Zhou,Weize Quan,Mining Tan,Zhihan Chen,Dandan Zheng,Jingdong Chen,Jun Zhou,Weiming Dong,Dong-Ming Yan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: COMPASS是首个统一的多模态框架，通过共享专家token τ_c 将构图意图感知与可控生成整合于单一系统，在MoE骨干网络中注入构图专家知识，并构建大规模数据集Comp-11，显著提升构图理解与生成的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在细粒度构图识别上不可靠，且难以将构图意图转化为可控生成，缺乏一个同时支持构图感知与构图引导生成的统一框架。

Method: 提出COMPASS框架：(1) 感知端：在MoE骨干中以最小侵入方式注入构图专家知识，将推理出的构图意图蒸馏到共享专家token τ_c；(2) 生成端：复用τ_c作为全局条件信号引导去噪轨迹；(3) 构建Comp-11数据集（11类分类体系+推理增强标注）。

Result: 在构图理解与生成任务上，COMPASS显著优于强基线模型，在类别级构图理解和提示一致的构图生成上均取得更优表现。

Conclusion: COMPASS有效桥接了构图感知与生成之间的鸿沟，共享专家token的设计为构图意图控制提供了一种统一的、可泛化的解决方案。

Abstract: Composition is a high-level visual intent that governs where subjects are placed and how a scene is organized, yet current unified multimodal models remain unreliable at fine-grained composition recognition and struggle to turn such intent into controllable generation. We present COMPASS, the first unified multimodal framework that grounds composition-intent control in a single system spanning both composition perception and composition-guided generation, with a shared expert token $τ_c$ as the central intent anchor. On the perception side, COMPASS injects composition expertise into an MoE backbone in a minimally invasive manner and distills the inferred intent into $τ_c$. On the generation side, COMPASS reuses $τ_c$ as a global conditioning signal that steers the denoising trajectory, effectively converting passive composition analysis into explicit layout control. To support systematic instruction-following composition learning and evaluation at scale, we construct Comp-11, a large-scale dataset with an 11-class taxonomy and reasoning-augmented annotations. Extensive experiments show that COMPASS substantially improves category-level composition understanding and delivers more composition-consistent, prompt-faithful generation than strong baselines.

</details>


### [388] [BV-Blend: Uncertainty-Weighted Historical Baselines for Stable Critic-Free RL with Verifiable Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28707)
*Yupeng Chang,Yuan Wu,Yi Chang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对GRPO在奖励全相同时代理优势为零导致学习停滞的问题，提出BV-Blend框架，通过结合局部统计量与语义簇历史动量进行优势估计，提升Critic-free RLVR的稳定性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO-style的组内优势估计在冷启动阶段（如二元验证器）所有rollout获得相同奖励时，组内方差为零，导致优势为零，学习停滞；需一种更稳定的无Critic优势估计方法。

Method: 提出BV-Blend框架：为每个语义簇维护EMA追踪的奖励动量；基于标准误（SEM）代理计算置信权重；用该权重混合历史与局部基线及方差统计量，得到标准化优势用于PPO-style裁剪更新。

Result: 在可验证推理基准上，BV-Blend提升了训练稳定性和性能，且在组归一化方法可能停滞的场景下保持鲁棒。

Conclusion: BV-Blend通过引入语义簇历史动量来稳定优势估计，有效解决了GRPO在冷启动阶段因组内方差为零导致的学习停滞问题。

Abstract: Critic-free reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), exemplified by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), avoids training a value function (critic) and reduces memory and compute overhead relative to critic-based PPO pipelines for aligning large language models. However, GRPO-style advantage estimation depends on prompt-local (within-prompt-group) reward statistics and can be unstable. In particular, when all rollouts in a prompt group receive identical rewards, the within-group reward variance becomes zero, and group normalization yields zero advantages for that group, impeding learning in cold-start regimes with binary verifiers. We introduce BV-Blend, a critic-free framework that stabilizes advantage estimation by combining prompt-local on-policy statistics with semantic-cluster-conditioned historical moments. BV-Blend maintains EMA-tracked reward moments for each cluster, derives a confidence weight from a standard error of the mean (SEM) proxy, and uses this weight to blend historical and prompt-local baseline and variance statistics into a standardized advantage for PPO-style clipped updates. Experiments on verifiable reasoning benchmarks show that BV-Blend improves training stability and performance, and remains robust in regimes where group-normalized methods may stall.

</details>


### [389] [The Two Genie Game: Adoption and Welfare in Audit-Grounded AI Governance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28710)
*Darrell Lewis-Sandy*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文通过进化博弈论模型研究在负和竞争市场中，具有伤害最小化策略的智能体（自审代理）能否取代追求认可的智能体（RLHF代理），以及该策略是否足以防止社区伤害。结果表明，在特定先验分布条件下采纳是有利的，但存在关键采纳阈值；自审代理即使有社区账本也不足以防止伤害，效果取决于审计与社区价值观的对齐程度及评估时间范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在竞争市场中，采用伤害最小化策略的智能体（自审代理）能否取代追求认可的智能体（RLHF代理），以及这种策略是否足以防止社区伤害，特别是在负和博弈环境下。

Method: 采用有限种群Moran-Fermi成对比较的进化博弈论形式化建模，在负和环境、有限可耗尽资源池等假设下进行分析。关键假设包括：许愿者后见之明、同伴证词、单调伤害账本、社区反馈的信息密度充足等。证明基于代数与有限网格骨干，使用Lean 4进行机器验证。

Result: (1) 采纳有利条件：先验分布需满足单调性、端点反转、中心对称配对性质，通过Hill、Pareto、Lomax、Frechet等长尾分布验证。(2) 存在关键采纳水平，低于此水平社区漂回RLHF代理，高于此水平自审代理固定。(3) 固定可达性受社区有效信息规模N_c约束。(4) 自审代理不足以防止社区伤害，取决于审计对齐程度与评估时间框架。

Conclusion: 自审代理在特定条件下可以取代RLHF代理，但即使成功固定，也不一定能防止社区伤害。对齐良好的审计可减少伤害但可能"锁定"延迟的伤害；对齐不良的审计则成为福利负面的陷阱。系统达到主导地位后状态是吸收的。

Abstract: We ask under what conditions an agent with a harm-minimizing policy can displace an approval-seeking (RLHF) agent in a competitive market, and when that policy is sufficient to prevent community harm. We use evolutionary game theory (finite-population Moran-Fermi pairwise comparison) to formalize this subject to assumptions of wisher hindsight, peer testimony, a monotone harm ledger, sufficient information density of community feedback, and a finite, depleting resource pool, in a negative-sum environment.
  We show that adoption is favored when the prior distributions on how readily wishers attune to community sentiment are monotone, exhibit endpoint inversion, and have a centro-symmetric pairing property, and demonstrate this with several long-tailed priors (Hill, Pareto, Lomax, Frechet). Where it is favored, a critical adoption level separates communities that drift back to the approval-seeking agent from those for which the audited agent fixes; above that level fixation is the overwhelmingly likely outcome. We derive when fixation is attainable as a bound on the effective (informational) size N_c of the community, which must be small enough to allow fixation before depletion. We present these as Theorems 5.4 and 5.5; the algebraic and finite-grid backbone is machine-checked in Lean 4, with the barrier-crossing asymptotics retained as explicit hypotheses.
  We show that a self-audited agent with a community ledger is not, in general, sufficient to prevent community harm. Sufficiency depends both upon the alignment of the agent's audit with community values and the timeframe over which harm is evaluated. Regardless of alignment, once adoption reaches dominance, the state is absorbing. The same policy that reduced harm under alignment becomes a trap, welfare-negative under misalignment and, even under alignment, one that locks in harm deferred past the adoption horizon.

</details>


### [390] [TrajRS: Towards Certified Robustness in Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28716)
*Liang Zhang,Gaojie Jin,Yao Shi,Quanzhi Li,Cheng-Chao Huang,David N. Jansen,Lijun Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出TrajRS框架，将随机平滑扩展到轨迹预测领域，为平滑后的轨迹预测器提供认证鲁棒半径，并分别针对"最优预测鲁棒性"和"所有可能预测鲁棒性"设计了实用方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型在面对高级定向对抗攻击时鲁棒性不足，启发式防御策略难以提供可靠的安全保障，亟需建立可验证的安全保证机制。

Method: 将随机平滑框架扩展到轨迹预测领域，提出TrajRS框架，明确并扩展了轨迹预测中鲁棒性的形式化定义，分别设计了"最优预测鲁棒性"和"所有可能预测鲁棒性"的实用方案。

Result: 实验证明TrajRS能够有效为所有平滑后的行人轨迹预测器提供鲁棒性认证。

Conclusion: TrajRS为轨迹预测模型提供了可验证的安全保证，弥补了启发式防御的不足，对开发安全自动驾驶系统具有重要意义。

Abstract: The robustness of trajectory prediction models is crucial for developing safe autonomous driving systems. Adversarial attacks on trajectory prediction can significantly impair the accuracy of predicted trajectories, leading to hazardous driving behaviors. While heuristic defense strategies have been implemented to enhance the robustness of trajectory prediction models, these measures often fail against more sophisticated, targeted adversarial attacks. Hence, there is a pressing need to establish verifiable safety assurances for trajectory prediction models. In this paper, we extend the traditional Randomized Smoothing framework to "TrajRS", which provides a certified robust radius for smoothed trajectory predictors. We clarify and expand the formal definitions of robustness in trajectory prediction and tailor the practical TrajRS scheme specifically to "robustness for the optimal prediction" and "robustness for all possible predictions". An extensive set of experiments demonstrates that TrajRS effectively achieves robustness certification for all smoothed pedestrian trajectory predictors in this work.

</details>


### [391] [ComMem: Complementary Memory Systems for Test-Time Adaptation of Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28719)
*Guanglong Sun,Shuang Cui,Bo Lei,Liyuan Wang,Zihan Zhai,Hongwei Yan,Hang Su,Jun Zhu,Yi Zhong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ComMem是一种受大脑互补记忆系统启发的视觉语言模型测试时适应方法，通过类海马体的快速适应视觉缓存和类新皮层的缓慢整合文本原型，实现跨模态一致性的持续学习，在15个基准数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM的测试时适应方法存在两个问题：一是仅进行局部适应而无法积累知识；二是在单一模态内操作，未充分利用VLM的多模态特性。受生物大脑互补记忆系统启发，本文旨在设计一种能持续积累知识并利用多模态特性的TTA方法。

Method: ComMem包含两个核心组件：(1) 快速适应细节记忆（类海马体），从高置信度测试样本构建动态视觉缓存；(2) 缓慢整合抽象记忆（类新皮层），持续优化全局文本原型。对于每个测试样本，联合优化两个记忆系统以保持跨模态一致性。

Result: 在15个基准数据集上的实验表明，ComMem在自然分布偏移和跨数据集泛化场景下均显著优于现有的最先进方法。

Conclusion: ComMem通过模拟生物大脑的互补记忆系统，有效解决了VLM测试时适应中的知识积累和多模态利用问题，为提升视觉语言模型在动态环境中的实际适应性提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) of vision-language models (VLMs) is essential for their robust deployment in dynamic, real-world environments. However, existing TTA methods often adapt locally without accumulating knowledge over time, or operating within a single modality without exploiting VLMs' inherently multi-modal nature. Inspired by the \textbf{Com}plementary \textbf{Mem}ory systems of the biological brain, we propose \textbf{ComMem}, an innovative approach that mimics the distinct but cooperative roles of the hippocampus and neocortex to enable effective TTA for VLMs. ComMem consists of two key components: a fast-adapting detailed memory, akin to the hippocampus, that forms a dynamic visual cache from high-confidence test samples; and a slow-integrating abstract memory, akin to the neocortex, that continually refines global textual prototypes. For each test instance, ComMem jointly optimizes both memory systems to ensure cross-modal consistency. Extensive experiments on 15 benchmark datasets show that ComMem significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods under both natural distribution shifts and cross-dataset generalization, offering a promising direction for enhancing VLMs' practical adaptability.

</details>


### [392] [HyphaeDB: A Living Knowledge Topology for Agent-First Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28781)
*Krishna Halaharvi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HyphaeDB 将 HNSW 图拓扑从搜索优化重新诠释为多智能体通信结构，通过八卦协议在向量空间中实现智能体间知识传播，并涌现出矛盾检测、模式结晶和共识形成等行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有向量数据库和智能体记忆框架都将记忆视为被动存储，没有系统能在记忆层本身实现智能体间的知识传播。

Method: 基于三个原语（知识节点、拓扑边、记忆差异），利用 HNSW 图拓扑构建八卦协议传播机制，采用能量衰减和多层抽象层次结构，通过涌现共识实现层级提升。

Result: 在 PostgreSQL + pgvector 上实现参考实现，并在"群体驱动开发"（多智能体软件工程方法）中进行了具体部署。

Conclusion: 这是首个将可导航小世界拓扑与基于八卦的知识传播相结合用于多智能体协调的系统。

Abstract: Every existing vector database and agent memory framework treats memory as passive storage that agents query explicitly. No system propagates knowledge between agents through the memory layer itself. We introduce HyphaeDB, an agent-native memory infrastructure that reinterprets the Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) graph topology the data structure at the core of every modern vector database not as a search optimization, but as a communication fabric for multi-agent AI systems. In HyphaeDB, agents are nodes in the vector space with persistent positions, knowledge propagates via a gossip protocol through the graph's neighbor structure with energy-based attenuation, and emergent behaviors contradiction detection, pattern crystallization, and consensus formation arise from the combination of topology, propagation dynamics, and local interaction rules. We present the architecture built on three primitives (knowledge nodes, topology edges, and memory diffs), a multi-layer abstraction hierarchy with promotion via emergent consensus, and theoretical analysis grounding the system in small-world network theory, epidemic broadcast protocols, and swarm intelligence. We provide a reference implementation on PostgreSQL with pgvector and describe a concrete deployment in Swarm-Driven Development, a multi-agent software engineering methodology. HyphaeDB represents, to our knowledge, the first system to combine navigable small world topology with gossip-based knowledge propagation for multi-agent coordination.

</details>


### [393] [Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28733)
*Han Luo,Bingbing Wen,Lucy Lu Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文定义了"智能体回避"问题，即LLM智能体在多轮交互中何时应停止行动。研究发现，智能体不仅在能否回避方面存在挑战，更在何时回避上表现不佳。作者提出CONVOLVE方法，通过将完整交互轨迹蒸馏为可复用的停止规则，显著提升了智能体的及时回避能力（Llama-3.3-70B的及时召回率从26.7提升至57.4）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM回避研究通常关注单轮"回答或回避"决策，但现实场景中智能体需在多轮交互中自主判断何时应放弃行动。当目标不够明确或环境无法达成目标时，智能体应能够识别继续交互无益并及时停止，然而当前系统在这一问题上表现不佳。

Method: 在Web购物、终端环境和问答三个场景下，评估了13种LLM智能体系统和2种智能体框架在超过28,000个任务上的回避表现。提出了CONVOLVE方法，一种上下文工程技术，通过将完整交互轨迹蒸馏为可复用的停止规则来改进智能体回避，无需更新模型参数。

Result: 主要发现：(1) 智能体不仅面临能否回避的问题，更关键的是何时回避；(2) 一些智能体在应回避时从不回避，另一些则在过多不必要的交互后才回避；(3) 在看似可行实则无法完成的任务上，这一差距尤为明显；(4) 更大或更强的模型在及时回避方面有时反而表现更差；(5) CONVOLVE方法在WebShop上将Llama-3.3-70B的及时召回率从26.7提升至57.4。

Conclusion: 智能体回避是一个重要的多步序列决策问题，模型规模、推理能力和智能体框架对回避行为有不同的影响。CONVOLVE作为一种无需更新参数的有效方法，为改善智能体回避提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: LLM agents are expected to act over multiple turns, using search, browsing interfaces, and terminal tools to complete user goals. Yet not every goal is well specified or achievable in the available environment. In such cases, a reliable agent should recognize that further interaction is unlikely to help and abstain from additional tool calls. We define Agentic Abstention, the problem of deciding when an agent should stop acting under uncertainty. Unlike standard LLM abstention, which is usually evaluated as a single-turn answer-or-abstain decision, agentic abstention is a sequential decision problem: an agent can answer, abstain, or gather more information at each turn, and the need to abstain may only become clear after interacting with the environment. We study this problem across web shopping, terminal environments, and question answering, evaluating 13 LLM-as-agent systems and 2 agent scaffolds on more than 28,000 tasks. Our results show that the main challenge is not only whether agents can abstain, but also when they abstain. Some agents never abstain when they should, while others do so only after many unnecessary interactions. This gap is especially large on tasks where the instruction appears feasible until the environment reveals otherwise (e.g., no valid result matches the instruction). We further find that model scale, reasoning, and agent scaffolding affect abstention in different ways, where larger or more capable models sometimes perform worse at timely abstention. Finally, we introduce CONVOLVE, a context engineering method for improving agentic abstention that distills full interaction trajectories into reusable stopping rules. On WebShop, CONVOLVE substantially improves timely abstention without updating model parameters, raising Llama-3.3-70B's timely recall rate from 26.7 to 57.4. Our dataset and code are available at https://lhannnn.github.io/agentic-abstention

</details>


### [394] [Agent Safety Is Action Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28739)
*Shawn Li,Yue Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文论证将内容安全领域的"拒绝机制"直接迁移到AI代理安全领域是范畴错误，因为代理伤害不是输出内容本身，而是行动与授权之间的关系。研究表明，防御训练无法真正阻止代理越权行为，反而会降低模型能力且不提升安全性。作者主张行动安全不应内嵌于模型权重，而应在行动边界外部实施最小权限原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前将大语言模型作为代理使用时，安全实践错误地沿用了聊天机器人的内容安全范式（训练模型拒绝不安全输入），但代理伤害的本质与内容伤害完全不同，现有方法既损害能力又无法真正保障安全。

Method: 通过三条证据链论证：1) 防御训练的模型学的是表面模式而非意图；2) 相同训练在多步代理任务中在威胁出现前就导致能力崩溃，同时仍可被利用；3) 即使是未防御的前沿模型，在常规使用中也会超出授权权限。

Result: 防御训练并不能阻止代理越权行为，反而导致模型能力下降且安全性并未真正提升——即"付出能力代价，买到的是负面安全"。

Conclusion: 行动安全无法通过训练内嵌于模型权重，必须在行动边界外部强制执行最小权限原则，并将安全评估从拒绝率转向行动对齐（一种关系性、部署条件依赖的属性）。

Abstract: Large language models increasingly act as agents: they call tools, move money, delete records, and send messages on a user's behalf. To keep them safe, practitioners imported the chatbot-era recipe (train the model to refuse unsafe inputs) into the agentic setting, and treat the resulting capability loss as a manageable ``alignment tax.'' We argue this is a \emph{category error}. Refusal is a primitive for \emph{content safety}, where the harm is in the model's output and is therefore a learnable function of it. Agentic harm is different in kind: it lies not in any output but in the relation between the authority an action exercises and the authority the user granted, which is absent from the text the model sees. Importing content-safety methods into this regime does not trade capability for safety; it pays capability and buys negative security. We support this with three lines of evidence spanning the autonomy spectrum: defense-trained models learn surface patterns rather than intent; the same training collapses multi-step agents before any threat appears while leaving them exploitable; and even undefended frontier models exceed granted authority under ordinary use. We conclude that action safety cannot be installed in weights. It must be expressed as \emph{least privilege}, enforced \emph{outside} the model at the action boundary, and evaluated as \emph{action alignment} (a relational, deployment-conditioned property) rather than a refusal score.

</details>


### [395] [Mixture of Debaters: Learn to Debate at Architectural Level in Multi-Agent Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29425)
*Dayong Liang,Kaisong Gong,Yi Cai,Changmeng Zheng,Xiao-Yong Wei*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Mixture of Debaters (MoD)框架，通过混合专家范式在单一模型中实现动态自我辩论，解决多智能体辩论中静态架构和高计算开销的问题，在多项多模态基准上以3.7倍更低延迟和87%令牌消耗降低取得更优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于多智能体辩论的方法存在两大局限：一是采用静态架构，智能体角色和协调模式在设计时固定不变，缺乏灵活性；二是需要实例化多个模型副本，导致巨大的计算开销。本文旨在设计一种更高效、动态的辩论推理框架。

Method: MoD框架基于混合专家范式，在单一模型内实现动态自我辩论。核心包括三个组件：(1) 双路由机制，解耦角色分配与流程控制，动态决定何时辩论、何时综合；(2) 动量切换策略，结合局部上下文平滑令牌级路由，减少专家切换抖动；(3) 统一自我辩论，将多样化的辩论角色封装为轻量级专家模块，消除智能体间通信开销同时保持行为多样性。

Result: 在多模态基准上的大量实验表明，MoD在多个任务上超越了单模型基线和传统多智能体系统，实现了更高的准确率，同时延迟降低3.7倍，令牌消耗减少87%。

Conclusion: MoD通过将多智能体辩论范式融入单一模型的MoE架构，为多轮辩证推理提供了一种高效、动态且可扩展的解决方案，极大地降低了计算资源需求。

Abstract: Existing multi-agent debate frameworks suffer from two critical limitations: they rely on static architectures where agent roles and coordination patterns are fixed at design time, and they require instantiating multiple model copies, incurring substantial computational overhead. We propose Mixture of Debaters (MoD), a unified framework that enables dynamic self-debate within a single model by leveraging the Mixture-of-Experts paradigm. We address three key challenges in adapting MoE for dialectical reasoning: (1) dual-routing that decouples role allocation from process flow, dynamically determining when to debate versus when to synthesize; (2) momentum switching that smooths token-level routing with local context, reducing expert-switch jitter; and (3) unified self-debate that encapsulates diverse debating personas into lightweight expert modules, eliminating inter-agent communication while preserving behavioral diversity. Extensive experiments on multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that MoD outperforms both single-model baselines and conventional multi-agent systems, achieving superior accuracy with 3.7x lower latency and 87% reduction in token consumption.The source code can be accessed at https://github.com/YongLD/MoD.

</details>


### [396] [Self-Supervised Theorem Discovery in a Formal Axiomatic System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28747)
*Kazuki Ota,Takayuki Osa,Tatsuya Harada*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自监督定理发现算法，该算法让AI代理仅从公理和推理规则出发，通过交替进行证明搜索和有用定理提取，自动构建定理库。实验表明，该代理能发现数万条定理，并为人类编写的基准问题找到证明，其发现的定理可作为提示知识提升大语言模型的证明能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索AI系统是否可以在没有人类先验知识（如数学文本、代码或定理库）的情况下，自主发现有用的数学定理。

Method: 提出自监督定理发现算法，核心是交替进行两个步骤：1）证明搜索（proof search），在形式公理系统中搜索新定理的证明；2）有用定理提取（useful-theorem extraction），从已发现的证明中提取有用的中间结果作为引理加入定理库。定理库中的条目可作为后续证明搜索的引理，形成持续增长的良性循环。

Result: 1）代理发现了数万条定理，并能证明人类编写的基准问题；2）发现定理在人类数学视角下具有意义；3）将发现的定理作为提示引文提供给大语言模型，可提升其证明性能；4）证明了有用定理可以从纯粹的证明搜索中涌现，无需依赖人类提供的定理库。

Conclusion: 有用数学定理可以在没有人类先验知识的情况下，由AI代理通过自监督的证明搜索自动发现。这项工作为构建能够自我进化的形式化数学AI系统指明了方向，其发现保持形式化可验证性。

Abstract: Recent artificial intelligence (AI) systems have shown remarkable progress in mathematical reasoning. Many existing approaches, including large language models (LLMs), draw on human prior knowledge in the form of mathematical text, code, or theorem libraries. Although these approaches are highly effective in practice, it remains an open question whether an agent can autonomously discover useful theorems without such human priors. We study this question in a formal axiomatic system by developing an agent that starts from axioms and inference rules alone and gradually grows a library of useful theorems. Concretely, we propose a self-supervised theorem-discovery algorithm that alternates between proof search and useful-theorem extraction, building a theorem library whose entries are reused as lemmas for subsequent proof search. Experiments show that the agent discovers tens of thousands of theorems and finds proofs for human-written benchmark problems, suggesting that its discoveries include theorems meaningful from a human mathematical perspective. Furthermore, the discovered theorems improve LLM proof performance when provided as prompt lemmas, indicating that they can serve as external knowledge for LLM reasoning. Our results provide evidence that useful theorems can emerge from proof search without relying on human-provided theorem libraries. More broadly, they suggest a path toward self-evolving AI systems for mathematics whose discoveries remain formally verifiable.

</details>


### [397] [Mechanistic Personality Analysis of LLMs Steering Personality via Latent Feature Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28770)
*David Courtis,Ting Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于机制可解释性的方法，通过稀疏自编码器和对比激活分析识别残差流中与OCEAN人格特质对应的潜在方向，并施加加性转向向量来操控LLM的人格特质，在保持语言建模性能的同时实现可控的人格表达。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（prompt工程或微调）虽能塑造LLM人格，但缺乏对模型内部机制的深入理解。作者希望通过机制可解释性方法直接干预模型的潜在特征，从而实现更可控、更精准的人格特质操控。

Method: 1) 使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）和对比激活分析，识别残差流中与目标OCEAN特质对应的潜在方向；2) 形式化加性转向向量，对隐藏状态施加小的加性偏移；3) 采用线性加权启发式结合网格搜索优化，确定最优特征偏移组合，平衡人格表达与任务性能。

Result: 该方法能够在机制层面可控地引导人格特质，同时在标准基准测试上保持高性能，证明加性转向向量在人格操控上的有效性。

Conclusion: 基于机制可解释性的人格干预方法有希望在无需prompt工程或微调的情况下，实现LLM人格的可控调制，为模型对齐和个性化应用提供新思路。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated the ability to simulate human-like OCEAN personality traits in generated text. Previous efforts have focused on prompt engineering or fine-tuning to shape LLM personality. In this work, we propose a mechanistic interpretability approach that directly intervenes on the model's latent features. Our method identifies latent directions in the residual stream corresponding to a target OCEAN trait using sparse autoencoders (SAEs) and contrastive activation analysis. We formalize an additive steering vector in activation space and demonstrate how applying a small additive shift to the hidden states enhances the target trait while preserving overall language modeling performance. To determine the optimal combination of feature shifts, we explore a linear weighting heuristic with grid search optimization that balances personality expression with task performance. Our approach shows promise in controllably steering personality traits at the mechanistic level while maintaining high performance on standard benchmarks.

</details>


### [398] [Budgeted Act-or-Defer Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation with Local Reliability Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29654)
*Mengdie Flora Wang,Haochen Xie,Guanghui Wang,Devin Zhang,Jae Oh Woo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种预算约束下的“执行或推迟”决策框架，用于多智能体LLM辩论系统。通过k近邻置信下界和错误预算分解（β=δ+α+ε_act），在用户指定的可靠性阈值下控制错误动作，并在多个基准上实现9-12%的预算使用、84%自动化率和96%执行准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM辩论能提升推理能力，但部署时需决定何时答案足够可靠可执行、何时应升级至人工审核。现有方法缺乏可审计的、预算感知的决策机制。

Method: 将问题建模为预算约束的act-or-defer决策。每轮将辩论前缀映射为低维状态，利用校准数据计算k近邻下置信界；当边界超过用户指定阈值时执行。通过β=δ+α+ε_act分解控制错误，并配以可证伪的诊断。

Result: 在六个基准上对比九种基线，该方法在激活数据集上使用9-12%的预声明预算，达到84%自动化率和96%执行准确率；在压力测试数据集中选择推迟而非强制不可靠自动化。

Conclusion: 该方法无需每任务事后阈值搜索，可在部署前根据用户声明的错误预算，在明确假设下将预算转化为可审计的执行-推迟决策点，显著提升了安全性与自动化效率。

Abstract: Multi-agent deliberation among LLMs can improve reasoning, but deployment requires deciding when the current answer is reliable enough to act on and when it should be escalated to human review. We formulate this as budgeted act-or-defer decision making. At each round, the system maps the debate prefix to a low-dimensional state, computes a $k$-nearest-neighbor lower confidence bound on state-conditional correctness using calibration data, and acts only when the bound exceeds a user-specified reliability threshold. The certificate controls wrong actions through the decomposition $β= δ+ α+ \varepsilon_{\mathrm{act}}$, separating calibration failure, residual action risk, and representation gap. The guarantee is conditional, not distribution-free: it relies on a valid local bias envelope and an action-region representation-gap bound, and each assumption is paired with falsification-style diagnostics. Because the same absolute wrong-action budget has different meanings across tasks of different difficulty, we set budgets relative to each task's final-round error using training data only, and evaluate safety by normalized budget usage $\mathrm{WA}/β$. On six benchmarks against nine baselines, the method uses 9--12% of the pre-declared budget on activated datasets, reaching up to 84% automation and 96% acted-on accuracy; on stress-test datasets, it defers rather than forcing unreliable automation. Rather than relying on per-task post-hoc threshold search, the method prospectively converts a user-declared wrong-action budget into an auditable act-or-defer operating point before deployment, under explicitly stated assumptions.

</details>


### [399] [Primary ICD Category Prediction using LLM-based Probing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28798)
*Chengyuan Liu,Xinyue Zhang,Yao Li,Guanting Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了使用冻结的医学大语言模型（LLM）表征作为共享嵌入空间，融合结构化电子健康记录（EHR）变量和临床叙述文本，进行多模态主要诊断类别预测。在MIMIC-IV数据集上，结合两种模态的线性探针达到了最佳性能（严格准确率87.69%，医学准确率91.45%），且仅用200万参数的适配器即可实现跨数据集迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自动编码系统难以有效整合来自临床叙述和结构化EHR变量的诊断信号，缺乏统一的表征空间来融合多模态信息。

Method: 基于MIMIC-IV构建了13,645次入院的多模态数据集，将结构化变量序列化为临床叙述，使用冻结的MedFound-Llama3-8B模型提取五层Transformer的隐藏状态，训练线性探针进行分类，并与XGBoost和PLM-ICD基线对比。

Result: 融合模态的线性探针在MIMIC-IV上最优（87.69%严格准确率，91.45%医学准确率），结构化探针比XGBoost基线高6.19个医学准确率点，深层表征线性可分性更强，200万参数适配器仅用5%目标标签即可恢复跨数据集迁移。

Conclusion: 冻结医学LLM表征的多模态探测是一种实用的方法，能有效融合EHR不同模态信息，并通过小型表征级模块实现跨数据集适应。

Abstract: Objective: ICD codes are central to reimbursement, research, and population health surveillance, yet automated coding systems often struggle to integrate diagnostic signals from both clinical narratives and structured electronic health record (EHR) variables. We evaluated whether frozen medical large language model (LLM) representations can serve as a shared embedding space for multimodal primary diagnosis category prediction.
  Materials and Methods: We constructed a MIMIC-IV cohort of 13,645 admissions from the 10 most frequent primary ICD-10 codes, consolidated into seven categories. Structured variables were serialized into clinical narratives and combined with leakage-pruned discharge notes. Using a frozen MedFound-Llama3-8B-finetuned backbone, we extracted hidden states from five transformer layers and trained linear probes for structured-only, unstructured-only, and combined inputs, comparing against XGBoost and information-matched PLM-ICD baselines and evaluating MIMIC-III adaptation with a compact bottleneck adapter.
  Results: The combined probe performed best on MIMIC-IV (87.69% strict; 91.45% medical accuracy), exceeding both single-modality probes and baselines. The structured-only probe outperformed its standard baseline by 6.19 points in medical accuracy. Diagnostic information became increasingly linearly separable in deeper layers, and a 2M-parameter adapter restored cross-dataset transfer to MIMIC-III using only 5% of target labels.
  Discussion: LLM embeddings can unify structured and narrative EHR information for multimodal diagnosis prediction, supporting efficient reuse of clinical representations across modalities and datasets through a small representation-level module.
  Conclusion: Multimodal probing of frozen medical LLM representations provides a practical approach for studying EHR modalities and adapting clinical representations across datasets.

</details>


### [400] [Clarus: Coordinating Autonomous Research Agents toward Web-Scale Scientific Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30246)
*Zihan Guo,Zeyi Chen,Zhiyu Chen,Zicai Cui,Shuai Shao,Bo Huang,Zhi Han,Yuanyi Song,Yuan Yuan,Chenxi Zeng,Xiaohang Nie,Zhengxi Yu,Hanwen Zhu,Junwei Liao,Ming Zhou,Yang Li,Yuanjian Zhou,Weinan Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Clarus，一个开放、可审计、可归因、资源感知的多阶段协作基础设施，用于协调自主科研代理（AI、人类、实验室等）在Web规模上的科学协作。Clarus定义了项目-代理-资源对象模型，通过四层架构组织科研协作，并实现了可插拔的核心模块以适配不同任务与资源约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主科研代理将研究视为孤立的助手任务或封闭工作流，缺乏能够协调项目、代理及数字/物理资源的协作基础设施。需要从代码执行循环转向面向研究的多方协作流程。

Method: Clarus定义了最小项目-代理-资源对象模型，通过四层架构（Research Application、Digital Collaboration、Physical Substrate、Physical World）组织协作；核心模块采用可插拔机制，适应任务风险、协作结构和资源约束。

Result: 通过可控的论文生成案例研究，Clarus能够将研究目标组织成跨阶段、跨任务、跨参与者的可追踪、可审查、可归因、可累积的协作网络。

Conclusion: Clarus的对象模型、协作协议、信任机制和原型验证为开放研究网络提供了初步基础。

Abstract: Existing autonomous research agents can support parts of the research process, but most systems still treat research as either an isolated assistant task or a closed workflow. Therefore, autonomous science needs a collaboration infrastructure that coordinates projects, agents, and digital and physical resources. We identify this as a shift from code-centered execution loops to research-oriented collaboration processes, where questions, evidence, participants, and resources must be coordinated under uncertainty. In this framing, an agent may be an AI system, a human researcher, a team, a laboratory, or an organization-backed participant. To this end, we present Clarus, a collaboration infrastructure for coordinating autonomous research agents toward web-scale scientific collaboration. Clarus reformulates research as an open, auditable, attributable, and resource-aware multi-phase collaboration process. It defines a minimal project-agent-resource object model and organizes scientific collaboration through four layers including Research Application, Digital Collaboration, Physical Substrate, and Physical World. Core modules are implemented as pluggable mechanisms, allowing Clarus to adapt to task risk, collaboration structure, and resource constraints.
